sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114640" key="xrhmatofu/lac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρημᾰτο-φύλαξ</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n114640.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">praefectus aerarii,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:38:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.34</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
